urdu transliteration text:
Hussain Jata Hai Marne Ko Aai Meri Zainab (Sa),
Qareeb Aa Gaya Ab Wakt Aakhri Zainab (Sa),
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Hussain is going to martyrdom O Zainab. The end is near O Zainab.

urdu transliteration text:
Salam Tum Pe Aai Baba Ki Laadli Zainab (SA) Zainab (SA) Ne Kaha Kaun Hai Pardes Me Mera
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Salaam O Father's cherished one. Zainab cried who is there for me in this foreign land!

urdu transliteration text:
Kyun Jaate Ho Tum Chod Ke Bhaiya Mujhe Tanha,
Zainab (Sa) Ko Har Ek Mod Pe Tadpaiengi Dunia,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O Brother why are you leaving me alone here. The world will torture Zainab at every opportunity.

urdu transliteration text:
Yaad Aaonge Bhaiya, Yaad Aaonge Bhaiya.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I will remember you O' brother, I will remember you O' brother.

urdu transliteration text:

Us Wakt Garibi Bhi Karengi Mera Matam,
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: After you my loneliness will be such that. The Lonely will lament (do matam) for me.

urdu transliteration text:
Saadat Ko Jub Rah Me Denga Koi Sadka.

english translation text: When someone gives sadqa to the Sayyed's

english translation text: I will remember you O' brother, I will remember you O' brother.

Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: O brother my happiness was related to this month. My favourite Eid was the third of Shaban.

Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You were so conscious of Hijab, O'brother, that you would take us to mother’s grave at night.
